title: Calculators
subtitle: Useful tools for your aquarium
invalidFields: Please fill in all fields with valid values.
calc.tpa.desc: Calculate the amount of liters for PWC
calc.watts.desc: Calculate the average watts per liter
calc.filtration.desc: Check if the filter is adequate
calc.idealFilter.desc: Recommend the ideal filter for your aquarium
calc.heater.desc: Recommend the ideal heater for your aquarium
calc.maxFish.desc: Calculate how many fish your aquarium supports
result.watts: You have an average of {{value}} watts per liter.
result.filtration: Your filter does {{value}} cycles per hour.
result.substrate: For a {{liters}}-liter aquarium, {{value}} kg of substrate is recommended.
result.idealFilter: For a {{liters}}-liter freshwater aquarium, a {{freshValue}} liters/hour filter is recommended. For saltwater, a {{saltValue}}-watt submersible pump is recommended.
result.heater: For a {{liters}}-liter aquarium, a {{heaterValue}}-watt heater or a {{thermoValue}}-watt thermostat is recommended.
result.maxFish: For a {{liters}}-liter aquarium, the maximum recommended is: {{verySmall}} very small fish (up to 5 cm), or {{small}} small fish (up to 10 cm), or {{medium}} medium fish (up to 20 cm), or {{large}} large fish (over 20 cm).
